playbook.intent: Owned audience → next product chosen by audience signal plus paid pre-orders before code.
playbook.scope: Pick the next product by mining an audience you already own (or are growing), not by guessing market need. Done = a signed waitlist plus paying pre-orders before line 1 of code, validated through audience-first conversations.

success-criteria.criterion: ≥10 pre-orders collected before any build starts

stage.name: Mine
stage.intent: Audience tells you what they actually pay for.

tasks.task: Pull 30 days of DMs, replies, and comments
Cluster pain points by frequency and intensity
Mom-test the top 3 pains over DM

stage.decision-gate: Advance only once each pain has at least 3 unprompted mentions.

stage.name: Frame
stage.intent: Turn the strongest pain into a product hypothesis.

tasks.task: Define pricing range from prior monetisation data

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if 3 audience members react positively to the framing.

stage.name: Pre-sell
stage.intent: Waitlist plus paid pre-orders before any code.

tasks.task: Ship a 1-page waitlist landing with explicit pre-order CTA
Open Stripe pre-order at a real price

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with ≥10 pre-orders or kill the bet.

extra.value: [Surveying random non-audience people, Picking based on TAM math alone, Building before pre-orders land]
['An owned audience of ≥500 (X, newsletter, IH)', Ability to collect waitlist signups and Stripe pre-orders]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content distribution-first-idea-validation --format md, agent: faion get-content distribution-first-idea-validation --format context, json: faion get-content distribution-first-idea-validation --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
